## Meeting Purpose

[Prepare for upcoming calls with Hex and Netwrix, discussing current status and strategies for engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Hex: Promising prospect, skeptical but interested. Need to build confidence in GrowthX's capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
  - [Netwrix: Potential challenges with main point of contact (Marielle). Need to assess partnership viability.](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Focus on improving strategy sprint conversion and retention rates is crucial for overall business health.](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)

## Topics

### Hex Opportunity Overview

  - [DM: Ashley (investor in Click, mentions Ramp and Webflow)](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Custom Notion doc created with insights and opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Seeking daily editorial content creation](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Recently ended relationship with previous agency](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Key attendees: Peter Ryan (Head of Growth, ex-Webflow), Brianna (Leader of Growth and Marketing Strategy/Ops)](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [ICP: Data teams, aiming for both technical and non-technical audiences](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [Competitors: Omni, Sigma Computing, Looker (also Mode and Deep Note for SEO analysis)](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)

### Netwrix Situation

  - CMO (John) and \#2 (James) ready for GrowthX initiative
  - [Content Marketing Manager (Marielle) potential red flag:](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
      - [Claims AI expertise, built custom GPTs](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [Prefers building in-house team](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [May be challenging to work with](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Company hasn't grown organically despite long-term content efforts](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Website issues: poor URL structure, outdated practices](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)

### Strategy and Conversion Focus

  - [Recent strategy sprint conversion rate drop: 3 out of 8 in last two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Overall blended conversion still high: 34 out of 37 (92%)](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Marcel developing 3-stage process to improve conversion](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [Prioritizing delivery, Check Back launch, and Atlas platform optimization](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Research Hex further before the call](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [Address Netwrix website issues during the call](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Potentially push back on Marielle's involvement if she joins Netwrix call](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [Continue using Marcel's time strategically on Wednesdays (4 hours/week)](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [Focus on improving strategy sprint conversion and client retention](https://fathom.video/share/VgcR6jwXRdxqDZR7LxTGJyRriiajykQu?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
